---
title: "Schedule"
---

<div style="overflow-x:auto">
<table class="table table-bordered table-sm schedule-table">
<colgroup><col style="width:5%"><col style="width:23%"><col style="width:23%"><col style="width:23%"><col style="width:23%"></colgroup>
<thead><tr><th>Week</th><th>Mon</th><th>Tue</th><th>Thu</th><th>Fri</th></tr></thead>
<tbody>
  <tr><td><strong>W1</strong></td><td>4/20 <a href="class/class-1.html">Day 1</a>:<br>Mastery Learning - Specifications Grading</td><td>4/21 <a href="class/class-2.html">Day 2</a>:<br>Activity - Reading Definitions and Classifying Functions</td><td>4/23 <a href="class/class-3.html">Day 3</a>:<br>Plotting in R</td><td>4/24 <a href="class/class-4.html">Day 4</a>:<br>Interactive Programming Activity</td></tr>
  <tr><td><strong>W2</strong></td><td>4/27 <a href="class/class-5.html">Day 5</a>:<br>Project Work (Cohesive Analysis)</td><td>4/28 <a href="class/class-6.html">Day 6</a>:<br>Practice with Functions</td><td>4/30 <a href="class/class-7.html">Day 7</a>:<br>Describing Functions (practice Reading Mathematics)</td><td>5/1 <a href="class/class-8.html">Day 8</a>:<br>Compare your Project 1 Task 2</td></tr>
  <tr><td><strong>W3</strong></td><td>5/4 <a href="class/class-9.html">Day 9</a>:<br>Activity - Practice with Logarithms</td><td>5/5 <a href="class/class-10.html">Day 10</a>:<br>Activity - Solving Equations</td><td>5/7 <a href="class/class-11.html">Day 11</a>:<br>Example Project</td><td>5/8 <a href="class/class-12.html">Day 12</a>:<br>See the Pieces</td></tr>
  <tr><td><strong>W4</strong></td><td>5/11 <a href="class/class-13.html">Day 13</a>:<br>Exploring new functions</td><td>5/12 <a href="class/class-14.html">Day 14</a>:<br>Probability Exercise (Tropical Storms Example from Prep)</td><td>5/14 <a href="class/class-15.html">Day 15</a>:<br>Likelihood</td><td>5/15 <a href="class/class-16.html">Day 16</a>:<br>Writing the Linearization</td></tr>
  <tr><td><strong>W5</strong></td><td>5/18 <a href="class/class-17.html">Day 17</a>:<br>Class Discussion - The derivative is a function applet</td><td>5/19 <a href="class/class-18.html">Day 18</a>:<br>Activity - Computing Derivatives Practice</td><td>5/21 <a href="class/class-19.html">Day 19</a>:<br>Activity - Compute derivatives</td><td>5/22 <a href="class/class-20.html">Day 20</a>:<br>Activity - Chain Rule</td></tr>
  <tr><td><strong>W6</strong></td><td>🚫 Memorial Day</td><td>5/26 <a href="class/class-21.html">Day 21</a>:<br>Activity - Derivative Practice with Parameters</td><td>5/28 <a href="class/class-22.html">Day 22</a>:<br>Activity - Chain Rule Practice</td><td>5/29 <a href="class/class-23.html">Day 23</a>:<br>Activity - Partial Derivatives With the Chain Rule</td></tr>
  <tr><td><strong>W7</strong></td><td>6/1 <a href="class/class-24.html">Day 24</a>:<br>Activity - Loglikelihood Practice, Derivatives, Optimization, and Project 2</td><td>6/2 <a href="class/class-25.html">Day 25</a>:<br>Activity - Comparing Solutions</td><td>6/4 <a href="class/class-26.html">Day 26</a>:<br>Find any extrema of $g(x) = x(1-x)$.</td><td>6/5 <a href="class/class-27.html">Day 27</a>:<br>Activity - Practice with Optimization</td></tr>
  <tr><td><strong>W8</strong></td><td>6/8 <a href="class/class-28.html">Day 28</a>:<br>Summary: Steps to obtain loglikelihood.</td><td>6/9 <a href="class/class-29.html">Day 29</a>:<br>Activity - Maximum likelihood Method for $f_6$</td><td>6/11 <a href="class/class-30.html">Day 30</a>:<br>Activity - More Practice with Maximum Likelihood Method</td><td>6/12 <a href="class/class-31.html">Day 31</a>:<br>Activity - Least Squares Regression: Another method for fitting a model to data</td></tr>
  <tr><td><strong>W9</strong></td><td>6/15 <a href="class/class-32.html">Day 32</a>:<br>Activity - Compare loglikelihood and least squares</td><td>6/16 <a href="class/class-33.html">Day 33</a>:<br>Activity - Balls in a Bag</td><td>6/18 <a href="class/class-34.html">Day 34</a>:<br>Activity - Targets for Continuous Random Variables</td><td>🚫 Juneteenth</td></tr>
  <tr><td><strong>W10</strong></td><td>6/22 <a href="class/class-35.html">Day 35</a>:<br>Activity - Calculating Expected Value using Rectangular Approximations</td><td>6/23 <a href="class/class-36.html">Day 36</a>:<br>Example 1</td><td>6/25 <a href="class/class-37.html">Day 37</a>:<br>Riemann Sums with R, Definite integrals with Mathematica</td><td>6/26 <a href="class/class-38.html">Day 38</a>:<br>"Infinite targets" and Rectangles - An Exponential Random Variable</td></tr>
  <tr><td><strong>W11</strong></td><td>6/29 <a href="class/class-39.html">Day 39</a>:<br>Activity - Practice with PDFs, CDFs, Expected Value, Variance, and Probabilities</td><td>6/30 <a href="class/class-40.html">Day 40</a>:<br>Solving a System of Equations</td><td>7/2 <a href="class/class-41.html">Day 41</a>:<br>Continuation from last time - More Practice with finding PDFs, Expected Value, Variance, and CDF</td><td>🚫 Independence Day</td></tr>
  <tr><td><strong>W12</strong></td><td>7/6 <a href="class/class-42.html">Day 42</a>:<br>Calculate a Percentile</td><td>7/7 <a href="class/class-43.html">Day 43</a>:<br>Definite Integrals and Geometric arguments</td><td>7/9 <a href="class/class-44.html">Day 44</a>:<br>Making Connections using CDFs and PDFs</td><td>7/10 <a href="class/class-45.html">Day 45</a>:<br>Teach One Another</td></tr>
  <tr><td><strong>W13</strong></td><td>7/13 <a href="class/class-46.html">Day 46</a>:<br>Change of Variables</td><td>7/14 <a href="flex/flex-1.html">Flex 1</a></td><td>7/16 <a href="flex/flex-2.html">Flex 2</a></td><td>7/17 <a href="flex/flex-3.html">Flex 3</a></td></tr>
  <tr><td><strong>W14</strong></td><td>7/20 Project Work Day</td><td>7/21 Project Work Day</td><td>—</td><td>—</td></tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
